name: Coconut-Pecan Filling and Frosting
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Evaporated milk or heavy cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the evaporated milk or heavy cream, sugar, egg yolks, butter, and vanilla in a saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens, about 12 minutes.
3. Remove from heat. Add shredded coconut and chopped pecans.
4. Cool until of spreading consistency, beating occasionally.
5. Makes 2 1/2 cups or enough to cover the tops of 3 9-inch layers.
6. For a thinner frosting, use only 2 egg yolks.
